title: Compare GPT-5.4 Triple vs Single
description: Three GPT-5.4 adversarial lanes plus GPT-5.4 summarizer versus a GPT-5.4 single-thread baseline, with full-worker context and expansive factual output style.

summarizerHarness.extraInstruction: Be explicit, methodical, and factual. Separate assumptions from verified facts, and keep sequencing operational.

workers.label: Proponent
workers.focus: benefits, feasibility, leverage, momentum, practical execution

workers.label: Sceptic
workers.focus: failure modes, downside, hidden coupling, consequences, externalities

workers.label: Security
workers.focus: security abuse, privilege escalation, hostile actors
